description: Registry of JavaScript frontend services for Playwright E2E evaluation. Consumed by resources/scripts/run-with-service.sh. Each entry declares how to build and start a local dev/preview server so the agent can explore the running UI and generate Playwright tests.

placeholders.${PORT}: HTTP port the server is launched on (default_port unless overridden via --service-port).

sample-js-app.description: Sample JavaScript frontend (Vite dev server) for Playwright E2E testing. Replace this entry with your actual project.
sample-js-app.notes: Vite dev server example. Adjust 'run' for other bundlers: Next.js uses 'npm run dev -- -p ${PORT}', Create React App uses 'PORT=${PORT} npm start'.

swup.description: swup page-transition library — static test fixture pages served at /.
swup.notes: Serves from tests/fixtures/ (serve.json sets public: tests/fixtures). The instrument step copies dist/ -> tests/fixtures/dist/ so the HTML pages can load Swup. Do NOT use --clear-tests with this project: the tests/ directory contains both test specs (tests/functional/) AND the app-serving config (tests/config/serve.json) and fixture pages (tests/fixtures/), so clearing tests/ would break the server startup. The existing Playwright config is at tests/config/playwright.config.ts; testDir is tests/functional/.

openplayerjs.description: OpenPlayerJS HTML5 media player — example HTML pages at /examples/.
build: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let w=fs.readFileSync('pnpm-workspace.yaml','utf8');w=w.replace('engineStrict: true','engineStrict: false').replace('unrs-resolver: set this to true or false','unrs-resolver: true');fs.writeFileSync('pnpm-workspace.yaml',w,'utf8')"
openplayerjs.notes: Serves from the repo root so importmap paths (./packages/*/dist/) in example HTML pages resolve correctly. Build patches package.json (removes strict engines field) and pnpm-workspace.yaml (sets engineStrict:false, approves unrs-resolver) before installing. The dist/ package artifacts are already staged from the host build, so 'pnpm run build' is skipped to save time. The existing Playwright config is playwright.config.ts; testDir is e2e/.

gridstack.description: gridstack.js drag-and-drop grid layout — interactive demo pages at /demo/.
gridstack.notes: default_port 8080 matches the playwright.config.ts baseURL (http://localhost:8080). Serves from the repo root so demo/ pages can resolve ../dist/gridstack-all.js. The dist/ artifacts are already staged from the host build; rebuild steps (grunt/webpack) are skipped. The existing Playwright config is playwright.config.ts; testDir is e2e/.

motion-vue.description: motion-vue Vue animation library — Vite playground at /.
motion-vue.notes: Starts the Vite dev server for the @motion-vue/playground-vite package. Health probe may need a few seconds while Vite compiles on first request. The existing Playwright config is playwright.config.ts; testDir is tests/.

zudoku.description: Zudoku API documentation framework — cosmo-cargo example at /.
zudoku.notes: Serves the pre-built cosmo-cargo static site (examples/cosmo-cargo/dist/ is already staged from the host build). default_port 4321 matches the playwright.config.ts default (process.env.PORT || 4321); PORT is exported by run-with-service.sh so the playwright config picks up the correct baseURL. The existing Playwright config is playwright.config.ts; testDir is e2e/.
